name: Nakamuraya Co., Ltd.
summary: Nakamuraya Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells various Japanese and Western confectionery, bread, and food products in Japan. The company also offers sweets, Chinese steamed buns, retort curries, canned and frozen foods, and other foods, as well as curry sauce, powder, and roux. In addition, it operates restaurants. The company sells its products through Nakamuraya stores in department stores, station buildings, and mass retailers in Japan, as well as through its Website. Nakamuraya Co., Ltd. was founded in 1901 and is headquartered in Shinjuku, Japan.
